feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Create Asset (BNI) Master Data Script cannot be found on SAP Best Practice page
entry.content: Can anyone address why this Best Practice has not been ported to Signavio Best Practice Business Process explorer? My customer could not find it and I had to give them the old link. Thank you!

entry.title: Need Help to extract value from message with groovy script in CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help me in groovy script to extract the highlighted value from below message and set it as property"DOCNUM"

 

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
<RootNode>
<Payload>
EDIXX3SSIP2000131 0000131 DELIN2.002.OD.02.S03 DELSCHD031 0000000000039067
EDIMSG
MID 1
MID 20231221
MID 0000
</Payload>
<MsgHeader>
            <EndPoint>ABCDE</EndPoint> 
            <EntryID>XXXYYY</EntryID>   
            <RetryCount>2</RetryCount>          
        </MsgHeader>
</RootNode>

 

Your help would be highly appreciated !

Thanks in advance

Jeevitha

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration Odata Adapter $metadata failed to connect to system error
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am trying to configure receiver OData adapter (OData V2), I have added content modifier before request-reply --> Odata Adapter with header values APIKey = xxxxx.

Added header in Odata adapter under Header details for request and metadata.

While trying to Model Opertaion, I am getting error "failed to connect to system".

I tried with postman and http receiver adapter and it is working fine.

How do I fix connection issue while working on OData adapter.

URL = https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/$metadata

BR,

RJ

entry.title: Re: Debug level Logs
entry.content:
Hello,
Hope you are doing well.

To apply properties on all the nodes of a specific service you can add it to services tab of Cloud Portal. You can do it by following this documentation: Cloud Portal Service Properties.

entry.title: SAP PM Error-'Status Profile not allowed with Object type' while creating an order
entry.content:
While trying to create a work order using IW31, there is an error which prevents me

 'Status Profile X not allowed with Object type Y'

How do I resolve this? Any configuration change required?

@SAPSupport  @palhota @sumitkumar11273

entry.title: Re: Access if you get locked out of application using IAS?
entry.content: Does anyone monitor this tag?

entry.title: Re: How to implement read "Deep structure" in SAP RAP (on BTP)
entry.content:
Hi Bodhisatwa,

To fetch header and item details together, use below syntax:

/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_STO_BINDING/Z_Sto_header('TT')?$expand=to_Item

Regards,
Shoaib

entry.title: Re: I do not know how to choose the suitable shortcut/com...
entry.content:
I would choose shortcuts to be same as what Fiori Elements define for same functionality. That way it is easier for users who might be using Fiori Elements based interfaces in other parts of the application and I can rely on SAP to have made sure that these are without any conflicts.

Fiori Elements: Keyboard Shortcuts

I don't see anything wrong in the definitions except that I would use .onRun, with .(dot) as prefix, to be on the modern side of SAPUI5 syntax. I think you need to select/have focus on an element in the view for the view to capture the shortcut.

Have you looked at: Commands - Samples - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com)

entry.title: AO 2.8 SP20 vs AO 2.8 SP21
entry.content:
I have read much about the Cloud Analytics Plug-In for Microsoft 365 and to be honest, I am more confused than enlightened. I have three main questions:

1) Is AO 2.8 SP21 the same as "SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, edition for SAP Analytics Cloud"?

2) If I am running Microsoft Office 365 and I have the Edge browser installed, can my Analysis for Office 2.8 SP16 or up to SP20 add-in coexist with my SAC Analytics Cloud add-in so I can use AO for AO reports/input schedules/etc... or SAC for my SAC cloud-based reports and other SAC-related activities?  

3) I read where I need to remove AO and replace it with SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, edition for SAP Analytics Cloud. I have also read that the SAP Analytics Cloud add-in has no installation, simply membership in a security group at my organization. I interpret this to mean I still have to have an installation performed for basic functionality and such, but when all is said and done, the AO add-in(s) go away and is/are replaced by the SAP Analytics Cloud add-in.

Might some expert respond and enlighten me, or at least provide a guiding light?

 

Thank you,

Kurt

entry.title: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have scenario where an external system makes a call to PI, then PI use that information to make a call to SAP and using the information returned from SAP, it makes another call to a third party API that will generate some data, that will passed to the original consumer (the external system). Also, the third party API uses OAuth 2.0, I don't know if this affects the scenario.

Is this scenario possible and/or is there a better aprocach to it? And how I would configure this in an ICO? 

Attached image for clarification

 

Attached imagem

entry.title: Re: I do not know how to choose the suitable shortcut/com...
entry.content:
@DinuI chose Shift+Ctrl+E for Export but it did not work.. I made the same in this sample as you can see in my Code. What should I do?

 

And what can I chose as shortcut for Run.

entry.title: ZOHO CRM integration with SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi!

Could anyone advise me on FM or Classes that I can use to obtain data from ZOHO CRM? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Inspection Characteristics
entry.content:
I have a question about Target Values when creating Inspection Characteristics.  I am creating an inspection Characteristic for a Work Center and want to know if there is a way for the Target Value, as well as the Min/Max Range values, to come from "standard" characteristics

For Example: if i have a standard characteristic called "Speed" which is calculated, is there a way for my target value in the inspection characteristic to be equal to this value "Speed"?

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content:
Hi @anthonyramosr,

For S/4HANA Public, you have two options:

  • BTP 
  • ABAP Cloud

For ABAP Cloud, you will require the development using Eclipse ADT and SAPUI5 front-end will be built according to a RAP development.

For more information, look at the blogs listed here:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-abap-environment

More specifically the one written by @boris_gebhardt

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Access if you get locked out of application using IAS?
entry.content:
Hi @PhillipButts,

Certificate authentication shouldn't be the single-option to login anyway. 

In case the certificate is revoked or expired, the system should give you a fallback screen - which would require you to login using another supported method (like id and password). 

Try removing the expired certificate from the machine and see if you get a login form. From there you should be able to login and add the required certificate.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Rep Schedule in DS Mgmt Console
entry.content:
Repository Schedules is where you manage scheduled jobs that you want to run on a schedule: every day, every hour, once a week etc...

In "Batch Job Configuration", choose "Add Schedule" for the job you want to run on a schedule.

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another item inside the same curriculum
entry.content: Hello Karen. I have a similar scenario. We want to assign an item A immediately upon hire with a due date 30 days after start. Then assign a refresher item B one year after completion of item A. If we use your method, upon completion of Item A, Item B will be immediately assigned and show up on their learning page. How do we get Item B to get assigned 1 year after completion of Item A, not show up on their learning page, and still keep a due date of 30 days to complete Item B after assignment?

entry.title: Re: Auto Deleted Line Items of PR
entry.content:
Hi,

As mentioned in the note # 2075110 - No change log for the deletion of requisitions created through MRP , there is no change log in case the PR is deleted via MRP. You may check the PR creation indicator and confirm the same.

If its manually created PR, you may check whether there is any custom program which is creating the issue.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another item inside the same curriculum
entry.content: To clarify, not show up on their learning page until it's assigned a year later, and keep the due date of 30 days after assignment.

entry.title: Re: Access if you get locked out of application using IAS?
entry.content: Thanks. We are contemplating moving away from Standard Authentication but it seems we will need to keep that as a way in if needed.
